description: Adversaries may send phishing messages to gain access to victim systems.
detection: Monitor for suspicious email activity, attachment execution, and link clicks.

description: Adversaries may abuse command and script interpreters to execute commands.
detection: Monitor process creation events for scripting interpreter execution.
mitigation: Code Signing, Disable or Remove Feature or Program

description: Adversaries may abuse task scheduling functionality to facilitate initial or recurring execution of malicious code.
detection: Monitor scheduled task creation and modification events.

description: Adversaries may exploit software vulnerabilities in an attempt to elevate privileges.
detection: Monitor for exploitation artifacts and unexpected privilege changes.
mitigation: Application Isolation and Sandboxing, Exploit Protection

description: Adversaries may attempt to make an executable or file difficult to discover or analyze.
detection: Monitor for high entropy files and obfuscated script execution.

description: Adversaries may attempt to dump credentials to obtain account login and credential material.
detection: Monitor for lsass.exe access, SAM file reads, and credential dumping tools.
mitigation: Credential Access Protection, Privileged Account Management

description: Adversaries may use valid accounts to log into a service specifically designed to accept remote connections.
detection: Monitor for unusual remote service authentication and connections.
mitigation: Limit Access to Resource Over Network, Multi-factor Authentication

description: Adversaries may encrypt data on target systems or on large numbers of systems in a network to interrupt availability.
detection: Monitor for mass file modifications, shadow copy deletion, and encryption patterns.
